use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and dialogs
Destructive action buttons with visual warning styling
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
Ghost and link styles for inline navigation actions
ai_summary: A flexible button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for type-safe variants, and standard Tailwind focus-visible accessibility rings. Note: Despite the component name suggesting a file tree, the source code implements a standard button component with standard UI interaction patterns.
